<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get project details"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/projects/{slug}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve project settings, filters, and metadata.

**Required permission:** `project_read` (private projects only).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
